text.title: Lean Stack Bootstrapper Blueprint Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply lean-stack-bootstrapper-blueprint. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: List the product's actual needs: hosting, DB, auth, payments, DNS, observability.
step.description: Input: product brief. Action: Map needs to vendor services.. Output: service-map.

step.name: Apply r1: pick exactly one vendor per role (≤5 total).
step.description: Input: service-map. Action: Eliminate duplicates.. Output: service list.

step.name: Set monthly ceiling + alert threshold per vendor admin UI.
step.description: Input: service list. Action: Configure billing alerts.. Output: ceiling configured.

step.name: Author upgrade-trigger table (r5).
step.description: Input: ceiling. Action: Write triggers + actions.. Output: trigger doc.

step.name: Diagram the architecture (1-page Markdown + mermaid).
step.description: Input: all decisions. Action: Produce diagram.. Output: stack-diagram.md.
